channel.title: summarizedStoriesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DOJ Closes Criminal Investigation into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell
item.description: The Justice Department announced it will drop a criminal probe into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, marking a significant reversal in an unprecedented inquiry.

item.title: Speaker Johnson Faces Difficult Legislative Week as House Republicans Diverge from Trump
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson must push through three consequential votes before recess amid internal Republican divisions, complicating the path for key legislation.

item.title: Witkoff and Kushner to Meet Iranian Foreign Minister in Pakistan on Saturday
item.description: US envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner are set to travel to Pakistan to negotiate with Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi in pursuit of a diplomatic resolution.

item.title: Former Trump Aide Says Straightforward Honesty Is the Best Way to Approach the President
item.description: A former White House deputy chief of staff advised that business leaders seeking help from President Trump should communicate directly and honestly rather than strategically.

item.title: How a Dollar Liquidity Swap Line for Gulf Allies Would Mark a Policy Departure
item.description: Providing dollar liquidity to the UAE and other Gulf states affected by the Strait of Hormuz crisis would represent a significant shift in US financial policy.
